channel.title: Devops on My Linux Journey
channel.description: Recent content in Devops on My Linux Journey

item.title: Types of Virtualization - Complete Guide
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Guide to virtualization types for Linux and DevOps. Covers full virtualization (QEMU), paravirtualization, hardware-assisted (KVM), containers (Docker), and more.

item.title: DevOps Roadmap - Complete Learning Path
item.author: youcef7770@gmail.com (Youcef)
item.description: Comprehensive DevOps learning path from beginner to professional. Covers Linux, Git, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, cloud platforms, and infrastructure as code.
